choices.text: Gradio + HF Space. Few lines Python; push to Space repo; live URL. Free CPU tier; paid GPU upgrades.

questions.explanation: Gradio + HF Space. Easiest path from code to live URL.

choices.text: Inference Endpoints (production REST API) vs. Spaces (web UI demos). Endpoints: dedicated GPU, auto-scale, TGI optimized, pay-per-hour. Spaces: Gradio/Streamlit UI, free CPU tier.

questions.explanation: Endpoints = production REST APIs; Spaces = demo UIs.

choices.text: SageMaker + HuggingFaceModel SDK. Pre-built containers; 5-line deployment. Managed alternative: GCP Vertex AI, Azure ML.

questions.explanation: SageMaker + HuggingFaceModel SDK. Native AWS+HF integration.

choices.text: Right-sizing model. Default-to-biggest = #1 cost mistake. Smaller model + quantization + caching = 10-100x savings with minimal quality impact for most workloads.

questions.explanation: Model right-sizing. Smaller-first; upgrade if needed. 10-100x cost reduction.

choices.text: Self-host. ~$720/month per dedicated GPU vs. $30K API. Open-source model + TGI/vLLM continuous batching. Break-even 100K-1M queries/day; above = self-host saves; below = API simpler.
